_meta.description: Module function guide — Contains descriptions and parameter details for each function. Changes take effect without server restart.

POWER._description: Power Supply Control — Controls voltage/current settings and measurements for VUPOWER/K3010 power supplies connected via serial (RS-232)

Connect.description: Connects to the power supply via serial port. Automatically called when adding the device.

SetOutput.description: Turns the power supply output on or off.

SetValue.description: Sets the voltage or current value of the power supply.

params.value: Value to set. Voltage in V (e.g. 14.4), current in A (e.g. 3.0)

ReadValue.description: Measures the current voltage or current from the power supply.

SendCmd.description: Sends a raw command to the power supply. For advanced users.

RIDEN._description: RIDEN Power Supply — Controls RIDEN power supply devices connected via serial

TurnOn.description: Turns on the RIDEN power supply and sets the specified voltage.

Turnoff.description: Turns off the RIDEN power supply.

CAN._description: CAN Bus Communication — Sends and receives vehicle CAN messages via PCAN/Vector/Kvaser CAN interfaces

Bus.description: Connects to the CAN device. Automatically called when adding the device.

params.kwargs: Connection settings (interface, channel, bitrate, fd, etc.)

send_msg.description: Sends a CAN message. Supports periodic or one-shot transmission.

stop_all_periodic_tasks.description: Stops all periodic CAN message transmissions.

start_log_save.description: Starts saving CAN logs to a file.

status.description: Returns the current status of the CAN device.

status_is_ok.description: Checks whether the CAN device status is OK.

status_string.description: Returns the CAN device status as a string.

get_device_number.description: Returns the connected CAN device number.

CANOE._description: CANoe Control — Controls Vector CANoe simulation software: start/stop, environment variables, and system variables

open_simulation.description: Opens a CANoe simulation (loads a .cfg file).

close_simulation.description: Closes the CANoe simulation and exits the program.

get_EnvVar.description: Reads a CANoe environment variable value.

set_EnvVar.description: Sets a CANoe environment variable value.

CANAT._description: CANat Device — Sends and receives CAN bus messages via CANat hardware

init.description: Initializes and connects the CANat device.

params.ch1_fd: Channel 1 CAN FD mode. True (default) = FD, False = Classic
params.ch2_fd: Channel 2 CAN FD mode. True = FD, False (default) = Classic

stop_can_message.description: Stops periodic transmission of a specific CAN message.

can_message_save_start.description: Starts saving CAN messages to a file.

params.save_path: Save path. Uses default path if empty

BENCH._description: Bench Socket Communication — Sends/receives data and measures current via TCP socket with bench equipment

socket_connect.description: Connects to the bench equipment via socket.

socket_close.description: Disconnects the socket connection from the bench equipment.

SendData.description: Sends data to the bench equipment.

check_current.description: Checks whether current stays within the specified range during the measurement period.

IVIQEBenchIOClient._description: IVI QE Bench — Comprehensive control of relays, power, sensors, audio, LCD, buttons, and USB on the serial-connected QE test bench

Connect.description: Connects to the bench via serial. Automatically called when adding the device.

ACCOnOff.description: Turns ACC (Accessory) power on or off.

ACCSinglePulse.description: Generates a single pulse on ACC power. Used for momentary voltage fluctuation testing.

BatteryOnOff.description: Turns battery power on or off.

BatteryMinusControl.description: Controls the battery negative (-) terminal relay.

BatterySinglePulse.description: Generates a single pulse on the battery.

ILLControl.description: Controls the illumination signal (vehicle lighting interlock).

ReverseActiveHigh.description: Controls the reverse signal as Active High.

ReverseActiveLow.description: Controls the reverse signal as Active Low.

PPositonControl.description: Controls the P (Park) gear position signal.

NPositionControl.description: Controls the N (Neutral) gear position signal.

KeylessBootingControl.description: Controls the keyless (smart key) boot signal.

AirbagCrashDetection.description: Controls the airbag crash detection signal.

ShieldBoxControl.description: Controls the shield box (RF shielding box) open/close.

AmpControl.description: Controls the external audio amplifier power.

Detent.description: Controls the detent (rotary encoder for volume knob, etc.) signal.

AVNSDDetect.description: Controls the AVN SD card detection signal.

USBFrontSwitchControl.description: Controls the front USB switch relay.

USBRearSwitchControl.description: Controls the rear USB switch relay.

Telltale.description: Controls the telltale (dashboard warning indicator) relay.

TelltaleLED.description: Sets the telltale LED blink period.

LedTCU4.description: Sets the TCU4 LED blink period.

GetLEDPulse.description: Reads the current LED pulse value.

CheckLCDDimming.description: Checks the LCD dimming (brightness control) status.

CheckVoltage.description: Checks whether voltage is within the specified range.

CheckCurrent.description: Checks whether current is within the specified range.

ExtCheckCurrent.description: Checks whether external current is within the specified range.

EXT_CURRENT.description: Checks external current within range after a delay.

GetEXTCurrent.description: Reads the current external current value.

CheckEXTCurrentList.description: Checks whether collected external current values are within range.

ClearEXTCurrentList.description: Clears the collected external current list.

CheckKeyOutVoltage.description: Checks whether key output voltage is within range.

ClearKeyOutVoltageList.description: Clears the key output voltage list.

PlaySound.description: Plays a sound file on the bench.

WaitSoundUpdate.description: Waits until the sound update completes.

TenButton.description: Presses a button on the 10-button panel.

ThreeButton.description: Presses a button on the 3-button panel.

ThreeButton_Front.description: Presses a button on the front 3-button panel.

ThreeButton_Rear.description: Presses a button on the rear 3-button panel.

TwoButton.description: Presses a button on the 2-button panel.

FileToSD.description: Copies a file to the SD card.

params.sdCardFileName: File name to save on SD card

RelayInitialization.description: Resets all relays to their default values.

CallRelayFunc.description: Calls a relay function by index.

RequestRelaySet.description: Sets relays using a command list.

SetSystemTime.description: Sets the bench system time to the current PC time.

RequestSystemVersion.description: Requests the bench system version information.

CalcCRC16.description: Calculates a CRC-16 checksum. Used for communication data verification.

AnnouncesAutoTestStartOrEnd.description: Announces the start/end of an automated test.

params.bisStart: True = test start, False = test end

BATSwitchSETtoPC.description: Switches the battery switch from SET to PC.

BATSwitchUSBtoPC.description: Switches the battery switch from USB to PC.

RequestAudioStatusAndADCValue.description: Requests audio status and ADC value.

RequestAudioStatusAndADCValuePeriodicall.description: Receives periodic notifications of audio status and ADC value.

RequestAudioStatusPeriodicallyNoti.description: Receives periodic notifications of audio status.

RequestCurrentPeriodicallyNoti.description: Receives periodic notifications of current value.

RequestExtCurrentPeriodicallyNoti.description: Receives periodic notifications of external current value.

RequestVoltagePeriodicallyNoti.description: Receives periodic notifications of voltage value.

RequestKeyOutVoltagePeriodicallyNoti.description: Receives periodic notifications of key output voltage.

RequestLCDStatusAndIllumiSensorValuePeri.description: Receives periodic notifications of LCD status and illumination sensor value.

Send.description: Sends raw byte data to the bench.

WriteRawString.description: Sends a raw string to the bench.

ReceiveStart.description: Starts or stops bench data reception.

params.bStart: True = start receiving, False = stop receiving

SP25Bench._description: SP25 Bench — Controls SP25 test bench (eCall, reboot, factory reset)

factory_reset.description: Performs a factory reset on the device.

Uart._description: UART Communication — Performs UART serial communication and saves logs. Used for Linux console access, etc.

connect.description: Connects to a UART port (without log saving).

add_uart_port.description: Connects to a UART port and starts log file saving simultaneously.

send_string.description: Sends a string command via UART.

send_char.description: Sends a single character. No newline is appended.

send_control_character.description: Sends a control character. Used for special key inputs like Ctrl+C.

start_save_file.description: Starts saving UART received data to a file.

get_file_path.description: Returns the current log file path.

read_thread.description: Starts the UART receive thread. Called automatically internally.

Ignition._description: Ignition Control — Controls ICAS3/MIB3 device ignition via TCP socket (default: 192.168.1.4:15500)

connect.description: Connects to the ignition device via TCP socket. Note: testiface must be running.

send_packet.description: Sends an ignition command packet to the HU (Head Unit).

compare_packet.description: Checks whether the last received packet contains the expected data.

params.expected: Expected hex string. e.g. '00 65'. Returns True if found, False otherwise

KeysightPower._description: Keysight Power Supply — Controls voltage settings and waveform sequences for Keysight power supplies connected via Ethernet/GPIB

connectPowerSupply.description: Connects to the Keysight power supply via Ethernet.

getCurrentStatus.description: Returns the current power supply status.

setCurrentRangeAuto.description: Sets the current measurement range to auto.

checkMeasCurrentLessThan.description: Checks whether the measured current is below the threshold.

powerSupply_ask.description: Sends a SCPI command to the power supply and receives a response.

addToSeq_Step.description: Adds a step waveform to the sequence. Produces an abrupt voltage change at a specific time.

addToSeq_Ramp.description: Adds a ramp waveform to the sequence. Gradually changes the voltage.

addToSeq_Puls.description: Adds a pulse waveform to the sequence.

addToSeq_Sine.description: Adds a sine waveform to the sequence.

addToSeq_Exp.description: Adds an exponential waveform to the sequence.

addToSeq_Stair.description: Adds a staircase waveform to the sequence. Voltage changes in discrete steps.

addToSeq_Trap.description: Adds a trapezoidal waveform to the sequence.

setSeqArb.description: Uploads the arbitrary waveform sequence to the power supply.

runSeqArb.description: Runs the configured arbitrary waveform sequence.

isArbSeqStillRun.description: Checks whether the arbitrary waveform sequence is still running.

SSHManager._description: SSH Connection — Connects to remote devices via SSH for command execution and file transfer

params.hostname: Remote device IP or hostname. e.g. '192.168.1.100'
params.key_filePath: SSH key file path (alternative to password). Default: None

send_command.description: Executes a command via SSH and returns the full output on completion (blocking). Korean Windows output is automatically handled via cp949/euc-kr encoding.

send_command_stream.description: Executes a command via SSH and immediately returns a [BG_TASK:bg_x] placeholder (non-blocking). Output streams in real time and can be observed via the polling endpoint. Useful for long-running commands (netstat, tail -f, etc.).

send_file.description: Transfers a local file to the remote device.

get_file.description: Downloads a file from the remote device to the PC.

get_file_list_in_dir.description: Lists files in a directory on the remote device.

AudioLibrary._description: Audio Analysis — Performs audio recording and mute detection. Checks for silence from music/radio sources

params.audio_device_s: Partial audio device name. e.g. 'USB', 'PnP', 'pulse'. Default: 'pulse'

isMute.description: Checks whether audio is currently muted. Designed for music/radio sources (not accurate for single tones or white noise). Returns TRUE (muted) if signal-to-noise ratio is 25dB or below.

get_max_value.description: Returns the maximum amplitude value of the recorded audio.

get_min_max_local_maxima.description: Returns the local min/max values of the recorded audio.

ImageProcessing._description: Image Processing — Performs OCR (text recognition), image comparison, and template matching. Requires Tesseract-OCR

image_compare.description: Compares two image files. Returns match status and match percentage.

imagesearch.description: Searches for a target image within the source image (template matching). Returns position and match percentage.

image_cut.description: Crops a specific region from an image.

image_valid.description: Checks whether a captured image is valid (readable by OpenCV).

ocr.description: Recognizes text in an image (OCR). Requires Tesseract-OCR to be installed.

ocr_coordinate.description: Finds the coordinates of a specific text string in an image.

ocr_sentence.description: Finds a sentence in an image and returns its coordinates.

is_similar.description: Compares whether two text strings are similar.

calculate_sentence.description: Calculates sentence position from OCR results.

preprocess_image.description: Preprocesses an image to improve OCR recognition accuracy.

DLTLogging._description: DLT Logging — Captures and saves logs via direct TCP connection to the DLT daemon, with keyword-based PASS/FAIL evaluation (no GUI required)

StartSave.description: Connects to the DLT daemon and starts log capture + file saving in one step (connect -> capture -> save).

params.save_path: Save file path. Auto-generates in backend/logs/ if empty

StopSave.description: Stops log file saving and disconnects from the DLT daemon.

MarkStep.description: Marks a step boundary at the current log position. Used with SearchRange for range-based searching.

SearchAll.description: Searches the entire log from the beginning to the current position for a keyword, returning PASS/FAIL.

params.keyword: Search keyword (space-separated = AND condition). e.g. 'BootComplete', 'ERROR crash'

SearchRange.description: Searches for a keyword within the step range marked by MarkStep, returning PASS/FAIL.

WaitLog.description: Waits (blocking) until a log containing the keyword appears. Returns FAIL on timeout.

ExpectFound.description: Periodically searches the entire log until the keyword is found. Searches immediately, then retries at intervals (timeout / max_retries). Returns PASS if found, FAIL if not found after all retries.

params.max_retries: Maximum retry count (default: 5). Interval = timeout / max_retries

ExpectNotFound.description: Periodically checks the entire log to confirm the keyword is absent. Returns FAIL immediately if found. Rechecks at intervals (timeout / max_retries). Returns PASS if not found after all checks.

params.max_retries: Maximum check count (default: 5). Interval = timeout / max_retries

GetStatus.description: Returns the current module status (connection, capture, save, step marks, etc.).

ClearLogs.description: Clears the log buffer and step markings.

SerialLogging._description: Serial Logging — Captures and saves logs via serial port connection, with keyword-based PASS/FAIL evaluation

StartSave.description: Connects to the serial port and starts log capture + file saving in one step (connect -> capture -> save).

params.save_path: Save file path. Auto-generates in backend/logs/ if empty

StopSave.description: Stops log file saving and disconnects from the serial port.

MarkStep.description: Marks a step boundary at the current log position. Used with SearchRange for range-based searching.

SearchAll.description: Searches the entire log from the beginning to the current position for a keyword, returning PASS/FAIL.

SearchRange.description: Searches for a keyword within the step range marked by MarkStep, returning PASS/FAIL.

WaitLog.description: Waits (blocking) until a log containing the keyword appears. Returns FAIL on timeout.

SendCommand.description: Sends a text command via the serial port.

SendHex.description: Sends HEX bytes via the serial port.

params.hex_string: HEX string to send. e.g. 'FF 01 A0'

SendAndWait.description: Sends a command and waits (blocking) for a response containing the keyword.

params.keyword: Keyword to search in the response (space-separated = AND condition)

GetStatus.description: Returns the current module status (port, capture, save, step marks, etc.).

ClearLogs.description: Clears the log buffer and step markings.

SmartBench._description: Smart Bench TCP Control — Controls power, buttons, current, and LEDs on Smart Bench equipment via TCP socket

Connect.description: Connects to the Smart Bench via TCP.

CheckCurrent.description: Measures current and returns PASS if within range for 3 consecutive readings, FAIL on timeout.

CheckCurrentMoment.description: Measures instantaneous current and returns PASS if within range, FAIL if out of range for 3 consecutive readings.

CheckCurrentMaintain.description: Verifies that current stays within range for the specified duration.

SendRaw.description: Sends a raw text command directly.

MLP._description: MLP Logging — Receives and saves real-time logs from IVI/SAFE systems via MIB Log Protocol. Supports ICAS3/MIB3OI

set_config.description: Configures MLP settings. Sets the model and log save paths.

params.mlp_safe_file_path: SAFE log save path (ICAS3 only, optional)

logging_start.description: Starts MLP log saving. Must call set_config first.

MLP_IVI_READ_THREAD.description: Starts the IVI MLP receive thread. Called automatically internally.

MLP_SAFE_READ_THREAD.description: Starts the SAFE MLP receive thread. Called automatically internally.

PCANClient._description: PCAN Client — Sends and receives CAN messages via Peak CAN devices

stop.description: Stops transmission of a specific CAN message.

TigrisCheck._description: Tigris Check — Runs the Tigris test suite on a specific ADB device and checks results

Trace._description: Trace Analysis — Analyzes function call traces by comparing expected vs. actual call sequences

initialize.description: Initializes the trace analyzer. Deletes all previous data.

append_expected.description: Adds an expected function call pair (caller -> callee).

set_actual.description: Sets the directory containing actual trace files. Parses files and sorts by timestamp.

params.path: PC directory path containing trace files

compare.description: Compares expected calls with actual calls. Returns match status for each call pair.

timeliness.description: Checks whether the last expected result was called within the time limit. Must be called after compare().

get_basename.description: Returns the base name of a trace file.

COMMON_WINDOWS._description: Windows Utility — Utility module for saving Windows command output to files

start_save_file_from_command.description: Executes a command and saves the output to a log file.

get_file_path.description: Returns the current log file path.

Android._description: Android ADB Control — Controls Android devices via ADB: touch, swipe, app install, screen capture, etc.

connect_adb_server.description: Connects to the ADB server. Equivalent to 'adb start-server'.

adb_devices.description: Returns the list of connected ADB devices. Equivalent to 'adb devices'.

select_adb_device.description: Selects the target device for commands. Equivalent to 'adb -s' option.

adb_tap.description: Taps at a specific coordinate on the screen.

params.serial: Device serial (optional). Uses default device if empty

key_event.description: Sends a key event. Controls hardware keys such as Home, Back, Volume, etc.

adb_shell.description: Executes an ADB shell command. Returns the result.

params.cmd: Shell command. e.g. 'getprop ro.build.version.release', 'pm list packages'

Send_adb_command.description: Runs an arbitrary adb command via ReplayKit's own ADBService (selected ADB device auto-applied). Returns the output. e.g. 'shell pm list packages', 'install foo.apk', 'push file /sdcard/'

params.command: adb command to run (the 'adb -s {serial}' prefix is added automatically). e.g. 'shell input keyevent KEYCODE_HOME'

adb_screencap.description: Captures the screen and saves it as an image file on the PC.

adb_push.description: Pushes a file from the PC to the device.

adb_pull.description: Pulls a file from the device to the PC.

install_apk.description: Installs an APK file on the device.

uninstall_apk.description: Uninstalls an app from the device.

start_logcat.description: Starts saving logcat output to a file.

read_thread.description: Starts the device log receive thread.

WoohyunBench._description: Woohyun Bench — Test bench equipment that controls vehicle power (IGN/ACC/Battery) via UDP communication

Connect.description: Establishes a UDP network connection to the bench equipment. Automatically called when adding the device, so manual invocation is usually unnecessary.

Disconnect.description: Disconnects the UDP network connection from the bench equipment.

IsConnected.description: Checks whether the bench equipment is currently connected.

IGN1.description: Turns IGN1 (Ignition 1) power on or off. Corresponds to the vehicle's ignition power.

IGN1_Read.description: Reads the current IGN1 power state. Returns: 0=OFF, 1=ON, -1=read failure

IGN2.description: Turns IGN2 (Ignition 2) power on or off. Corresponds to auxiliary ignition power.

IGN2_Read.description: Reads the current IGN2 power state. Returns: 0=OFF, 1=ON, -1=read failure

ACC.description: Turns ACC (Accessory) power on or off. Corresponds to the vehicle's accessory power (radio, navigation, etc.).

ACC_Read.description: Reads the current ACC power state. Returns: 0=OFF, 1=ON, -1=read failure

BATTERY.description: Turns the battery relay on or off. When OFF, battery power is completely cut from the vehicle.

BATTERY_Read.description: Reads the current battery relay state. Returns: 0=OFF, 1=ON, -1=read failure

BatterySet.description: Sets the battery output voltage. Used for voltage fluctuation testing.

params.voltage: Voltage to set (V, decimal allowed). e.g. 12.0, 14.4, 9.0. Default: 14.4V

BatteryCheck.description: Measures the current battery output voltage. Returns: voltage (V), -1.0 on failure

AmpereCheck.description: Measures the current power consumption. Returns: current (A), -1.0 on failure

SendCommand.description: Sends a raw UDP command to the bench. For advanced users; using the individual functions above is recommended.

params.data_hex: Additional data (space-separated hex string). e.g. 'FF 01'. Default: empty string

GetInfo.description: Returns the bench's current connection information (IP, port, connection state).

SerialPlugin._description: Generic Serial Communication — General-purpose plugin for sending and receiving data via RS-232 serial port

Connect.description: Opens the serial port. Automatically called when adding the device.

IsConnected.description: Checks whether the serial port is currently open.

SendCommand.description: Sends a text command via the serial port. A newline is appended by default.

params.encoding: Character encoding. Default: 'utf-8'. Use 'ascii' for special equipment
params.append_newline: Append newline at end of command. True = append (default), False = do not append

ReadLine.description: Reads a single line from the serial port.

params.timeout: Max wait time in seconds. Default: 1.0

ReadAll.description: Reads all data from the serial port receive buffer.

params.timeout: Max wait time in seconds. Default: 1.0

SendAndRead.description: Sends a command and reads one line of the response.

params.timeout: Response wait time in seconds. Default: 1.0

params.hex_string: Hex string to send. e.g. 'FF 01 A0'

ReadHex.description: Reads the specified number of bytes and returns them as a hex string.

params.count: Number of bytes to read. Default: 1
params.timeout: Max wait time in seconds. Default: 1.0

SetBaudrate.description: Changes the serial communication baud rate.

GetPortInfo.description: Returns the current serial port information.

LOG_SERIAL.description: Waits (blocking) until a keyword appears in serial received data. Returns all collected logs. Space-separated keywords use AND condition.

params.keyword: Keyword to search. e.g. 'Pass', 'TTI_PASS'. Space-separated = AND condition
params.timeout: Max wait time in seconds. Default: 30

StartMonitor.description: Monitors serial for a keyword in the background (non-blocking). Proceeds to the next step immediately; check result with GetMonitorResult.

params.keyword: Keyword to monitor. Space-separated = AND condition
params.timeout: Max monitoring time in seconds. Default: 60

params.monitor_id: Monitor ID (e.g. 'mon_1'). Stops all if empty

GetMonitorResult.description: Checks the background monitoring result. Returns PASS/FAIL/RUNNING status and collected logs.

params.monitor_id: Monitor ID. Returns all results if empty

CMD._description: Command Execution — Executes Windows command prompt (CMD) commands. Used for running external programs or system commands

Run.description: Executes a command and waits for completion (blocking). Returns the result.

params.timeout: Max wait time in seconds. Default: 300

Check.description: Executes a command and verifies the output against an expected string (blocking). Returns a 'FAIL:' prefix on mismatch, which causes the step to be marked as fail.

params.expected: Expected substring or full match value
params.match_mode: Comparison mode: 'contains' (substring) or 'exact' (full match). Default: contains
params.timeout: Max wait time in seconds. Default: 300

RunCapture.description: Executes a command in the background and immediately returns a '[BG_TASK:bg_x]' placeholder (non-blocking). The actual output can be retrieved later via the polling endpoint.

CheckCapture.description: Executes a command in the background and returns a '[BG_TASK:bg_x]' placeholder. On completion, the server evaluates expected/match_mode to determine the final pass/fail.

RunBackground.description: Spawns a subprocess fire-and-forget. Returns the PID but the output cannot be retrieved.

params.pid: PID of the process to terminate

ListBackground.description: Returns the list of running background processes.

DLTViewer._description: DLT Log Viewer — Receives and analyzes real-time DLT logs from vehicle ECUs via direct TCP connection

Connect.description: Connects to the DLT daemon (ECU) via TCP and starts real-time log capture.

Disconnect.description: Disconnects from the DLT daemon and stops log capture.

IsConnected.description: Checks whether currently connected to the DLT daemon.

WaitLog.description: Waits (blocking) until a log containing the keyword appears. Space-separated keywords use AND condition.

params.timeout: Max wait time in seconds. Default: 30

StartMonitor.description: Monitors for a keyword in the background (non-blocking). Check result with GetMonitorResult.

params.timeout: Max monitoring time in seconds. Default: 60

params.monitor_id: Monitor ID. Stops all if empty

GetMonitorResult.description: Checks the monitoring result. Returns PASS/FAIL/RUNNING.

params.monitor_id: Monitor ID. Returns all results if empty

SearchLog.description: Searches the log buffer for a keyword.

params.count: Number of lines to retrieve. Default: 100

GetLogCount.description: Returns the total number of received logs.

LaunchViewer.description: Launches the DLT Viewer GUI application.

CreateProject.description: Creates a DLT Viewer project file (.dlp).

GetStatus.description: Returns the comprehensive current status of the DLT module.

VisionCamera._description: Vision Camera — Captures screens using a GigE Vision industrial camera

Capture.description: Captures the screen and saves it as an image file.

params.save_path: Image save path. Saves to temp folder if empty

CaptureBytes.description: Captures the screen and returns it as byte data.

CaptureToFile.description: Captures a PNG image to the specified path.

VisionCameraClient._description: Vision Camera Client — Low-level camera control module used internally by VisionCamera

md_VisionConnect.description: Performs a low-level connection to the vision camera. Use VisionCamera.Connect() instead for normal usage.

md_VisionCapture.description: Captures an image and saves it to a file.

params.left: Crop left coordinate. -1 for full image. Default: -1

md_CaptureBytes.description: Returns the captured image as byte data.
